t_ch: 嗯，一般漫画里这样的挑战背后一定有什么惊天大阴谋，不行，我…我要和{NICKNAME}一起战斗！
t_en: Yeah, in comics, a challenge like this is always a cover for some massive conspiracy... I... I've gotta fight alongside {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 三月，你要对{NICKNAME}的实力有信心。比起冲上去战斗，现在更应该做的是联系你们的同伴吧……
t_en: March, you need to have faith in {NICKNAME}'s abilities. Rather than rushing into battle, what you should be doing now is getting in touch with your companions...

t_ch: 这里可是「星铁FES」…
t_en: This is Star Rail FEST after all...

t_ch: 这里是「星铁FES」…就算打败我，你们也不会得到大家的认可。
t_en: This is Star Rail FEST... Even if you defeat me, you'll never gain everyone's approval.

t_ch: 你们不是我的对手。
t_en: You're no match for me.

t_ch: 我以为我们在珠星大厦交手时，结果已经很清楚了。
t_en: I thought the outcome of our clash at Pearluxe Tower was pretty clear.

t_ch: …队长，我们真的要这么做吗？
t_en: ...Boss, do we really have to do this?

t_ch: 小灰，我们在舞台上已经表演得够久了。你不是一直想成为真正的英雄吗！
t_en: Gray, we've been putting on a show for long enough. Wasn't becoming a real hero what you've always wanted!?

t_ch: 就在这聚光灯下撕碎外来者传奇！才能让大家看清——谁才是能真正守护他们笑容的英雄！
t_en: We'll tear the legend of this outsider to shreds, right here under the spotlight! Then everyone will see who the real heroes are, the ones who can truly protect their smiles!

t_ch: 我接受你们的挑战，但一定要在这儿开打吗？
t_en: I accept your challenge, but do we really have to fight here?

t_ch: 这里才是我们等待的「舞台」，动手！
t_en: This is exactly the stage we've been waiting for! Let's do this!

t_ch: …冷静下来了？可以谈谈吗？
t_en: ...Have you calmed down now? Can we talk?

t_ch: 谒者的挑战一旦开始，除非一方落败，便不会停止。
t_en: Once a Supplicant's challenge begins, it won't stop until one side falls.

t_ch: 别搞错了——这一场不过是幻月见证下，真正对决的序曲！
t_en: Don't get it wrong. This is just a prelude to the real showdown, witnessed by the Phantasmoon!

t_ch: 确实够娱乐。
t_en: That was quite entertaining.

t_ch: 还有第二波挑战？
t_en: There's a second round of this challenge?

t_ch: 他们来「星铁FES」到底是要做什么？
t_en: Just what exactly are they planning to do here at Star Rail FEST?

t_ch: 真珠没有猜错…
t_en: Pearl was right...

t_ch: 谒者不会放弃挑战的机会。
t_en: Supplicants won't pass up a chance for a challenge.

t_ch: 这就是真珠所猜想的，潜在水面之下的谒者吗？
t_en: Is this the Supplicant lurking beneath the surface that Pearl theorized about?

t_ch: 但四个破晓战士中究竟谁才是谒者？看实力，也许是红色的那一个……
t_en: But which of the four Daybreak Warriors is the Supplicant? Judging from their strength, I think it might be the red one...

t_ch: 先别发呆了，咱们还是到展区外看看情况吧！
t_en: Forget it! We should go check out what's happening outside the exhibition area!

t_ch: 唉，平白无故打断了一场演出。不过，其实我也没那么想看「云五战队集结」的舞台剧啦。
t_en: Interrupting a show for no reason. But to be honest, I wasn't dying to watch that "High-Cloud Squadron Assembles" play anyway.

t_ch: 所以…关于仙舟的故事，不会也是模糊老师瞎编的…吧？
t_en: So... don't tell me this whole Xianzhou story is also something Blurry made up...?

t_ch: 奇怪，我怎么一点儿也不意外。
t_en: Funny, can't say I'm surprised at all.

t_ch: 幻胧可不是我一个人打败的。
t_en: I didn't defeat Phantylia on my own.

t_ch: 是景元和丹恒协力…
t_en: It was Jing Yuan and Dan Heng working together...

t_ch: 我可不敢贪天之功为己功，其实幻胧是景元将军和丹恒联手打败的。
t_en: I wouldn't dare take credit for what I didn't do, since it was in fact General Jing Yuan and Dan Heng who teamed up to defeat Phantylia.

t_ch: 至于云上五骁，那五个人建功立业的时代，已经是七百多年前了。
t_en: As for the High-Cloud Quintet, it's been over seven hundred years since those five made their mark.

t_ch: 听起来也许很离谱，仙舟人的寿命普遍都很长。你看过绒绒号的漫画，里面应该有介绍这些设定吧。
t_en: I know it may sound wild, but Xianzhou folks generally live really long lives. You've read The Fluffy comics, haven't you? Pretty sure they covered all that lore in there.

t_ch: 有啊，长生不死…有人觉得那是诅咒。不过我却觉得，「丰饶」并没有祂的名声那么可怕。
t_en: Yeah, immortality... Some see it as a curse. But personally, I don't think the Abundance is as terrifying as THEIR reputation suggests.

t_ch: 可不敢说这样的话…
t_en: Better not say that out loud...

t_ch: 别在仙舟人面前这么说喔。
t_en: Don't say that in front of Xianzhou folks.

t_ch: 差点忘了咱们现在已经不在仙舟了…敞开了谈谈丰饶，应该没问题吧。
t_en: I almost forgot we're not in the Xianzhou anymore... Should be fine to talk openly about the Abundance now, I guess?

t_ch: 是没问题啦。但仙舟人对丰饶的态度也不算空穴来风——咱们和步离人交过手，和魔阴身打过架……
t_en: Yeah, that's not an issue. But the Xianzhou's attitude towards the Abundance isn't totally baseless. We've clashed with the borisin, fought against the mara-struck...

t_ch: 啊，一想到要是当年那场仗没能打赢幻胧，宇宙里可就诞生一个不死不灭的绝灭大君了。
t_en: Ah, just imagine if we hadn't won that battle against Phantylia back then, the universe would've ended up with an immortal, indestructible Lord Ravager!

t_ch: 其实，在我看来，「丰饶」与「欢愉」的相性还挺不错的。
t_en: Actually, I think the Abundance and Elation make quite a good match.

t_ch: 毕竟，只有拥有无穷的生命，才能追求无穷的喜乐。
t_en: After all, only with infinite life can one pursue infinite joy.

t_ch: 在我看来，活着的人，有选择死亡的权利。但活着的人，也有选择活下去的权利。
t_en: In my opinion, those who are alive have the right to choose death. But they also have the right to choose to live on.

t_ch: 毕竟总有什么东西，值得你在睡去后为明天睁开眼睛。
t_en: After all, there's always something out there that makes tomorrow worth waking up to.

t_ch: 好文绉绉的发言啊。这孩子，一认真说起话来感觉皱纹都上来了……
t_en: Wow, getting all philosophical on me now. When this kid gets serious like that, I swear you can practically see the wrinkles forming...

t_ch: 欸嘿！说起醒啊睡啊的，我们是不是接下来该去逛逛「匹诺康尼区」了！
t_en: Hehe! Since we're talking about waking up, shouldn't we head over to the Penacony Exhibition Area next?

t_ch: 啊，还要继续逛展？咱们是不是得提防着一些了？既然破晓战队都上门挑战来了，会不会还有其他谒者在我们看不见的地方憋坏呢？
t_en: Huh, you want to keep exploring? We need to be a bit more careful now, don't you think? I mean, the Daybreak Squadron already came gunning for us. Who knows if there are other Supplicants lurking around, just waiting to make their move?

t_ch: 哎呀，三月姐，不要一副担惊受怕的样子嘛，小浣熊不是三下五除二就收拾了对手吗？
t_en: Oh come on, March, don't be such a worrywart! Didn't our little raccoon take out those guys in no time at all?

t_ch: 有我在，你俩安心！
t_en: Rest assured, I've got your back!

t_ch: 好有安全感的发言啊！小浣熊，其实我一直是你的粉丝——
t_en: Such reassuring words! Little raccoon, I've actually been a huge fan of yours all along...

t_ch: 行行行，点到为止啊。
t_en: Alright, alright, don't push it.

t_ch: 出发，匹诺康尼！
t_en: Here we come, Penacony!
... Exhibition Area!

t_ch: 姬子！你来啦！
t_en: Himeko! You're here!

t_ch: 三月，{NICKNAME}，你们没事吧？瓦尔特提醒我收看直播，我看到了破晓战队向{NICKNAME}发起挑战。
t_en: March, {NICKNAME}, are you alright? Welt told me to watch the livestream, and I saw the Daybreak Squadron challenging {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我没伤害他们。
t_en: I didn't hurt them.

t_ch: 他们撤退了。
t_en: They retreated.

t_ch: 你做的很好，我猜他们的用意正是通过挑战来激起支持他们的观众的愿力。
t_en: You did well. I bet their intention was to stir up their supporters' Wishpower through the challenge.

t_ch: 如果你贸然伤到他们，也许转而会将许多支持者推向他们那一边。
t_en: If you'd hurt them recklessly, it might've pushed many supporters straight into their arms.

t_ch: 对了，这位是……
t_en: Oh, and you are...

t_ch: 又见到你了！列车领航员，姬子小姐！
t_en: Nice to see you again! Express Navigator, Miss Himeko!

t_ch: 恕我眼拙，我们以前见过吗？
t_en: Pardon my poor memory, but have we met before?

t_ch: 当然啦！…我在新闻上见过你不止一次！久仰久仰！
t_en: Of course! ...I've seen you in the news more than once! It's such an honor to meet you!

t_ch: 这位绯英小妹妹，应该是绘世学院的学生吧？我和{NICKNAME}在逛展时遇见了她，她可是绒绒号和列车的双重粉丝呢！
t_en: This is Evanescia. I think she's a student from Graphia Academy? {NICKNAME} and I ran into her at this expo, and she's a huge fan of both The Fluffy and the Express!

t_ch: 就是她给我画了面具。
t_en: She's the one who drew my mask.

t_ch: 你所说的在幻月秘庭里见到的女孩，就是她？
t_en: So that girl you saw in the Phantasmoon Courtyard... It was her?

t_ch: 等、等等…她给你画了面具？也就是说，英子其实根本一点儿也不普通是吗？
t_en: W—Wait a second... She made you a mask? So you're telling me Nescia isn't just a normal girl?

t_ch: 她到底是谁啊？
t_en: Who exactly is she?

t_ch: 我也不知道啊。
t_en: I have no clue.

t_ch: 报恩的狐狸小姐…吧？
t_en: A Miss Fox here to return a favor... maybe?

t_ch: 你到底是谁啊？
t_en: Who exactly are you?

t_ch: 我嘛，和你一样，是一位幻月游戏的观众，只是身处的位置有一点特殊啦。
t_en: Me? I'm no different from you, just a spectator of the Phantasmoon Games. Though I suppose my position is a bit... special.

t_ch: 和两位这一路，我玩得很开心。没想到，绒绒号背后的故事居然也这么有趣。
t_en: I had so much fun tagging along with you two. Who would've thought that The Fluffy had such an interesting backstory?

t_ch: 我想，是时候要和各位暂别了！
t_en: I think it's time to say goodbye for now!

t_ch: 你要走了吗？绯英小姐？
t_en: Are you leaving, Miss Evanescia?

t_ch: 既然被点破了身份，灰姑娘的魔法也要失灵啦。一时兴起的游玩，不妨就用一时兴起的离开做结好了~
t_en: Now that my identity has been exposed, Cinderella's magic is about to wear off. And since this little adventure started on a whim, might as well end it on one too~

t_ch: 小浣熊，你应该能感受到，这场展会所带来的关注、喜悦，随着你满足人们的「愿」，力量也在涌入你的面具。
t_en: Little raccoon, you can feel it, can't you? All that attention, all that joy from the exhibition. As you fulfill people's "wishes," that power has been flowing straight into your mask.

t_ch: 它或会成就一段善缘，也可能造就一颗恶果。无论你选择什么，我都希望，你不要成为一个无趣的角色。
t_en: It might spark something beautiful, or plant the seeds of something sinister. Whatever you choose, I just hope you won't become a boring character.

t_ch: 啊，我是不是又说的有点太多了……
t_en: Ah, I'm rambling again, aren't I...?

t_ch: 那这样吧…临走之前，猜个谜缓解一下尴尬气氛好了：你知道花儿为什么如此美丽吗？
t_en: Well then... Before I go, let me break this awkward moment with a riddle: Do you know why flowers are so beautiful?

t_ch: 不是…你背后的花哪来的？
t_en: Wait... Where did those flowers behind you come from?

t_ch: 怎么啦，美少女自带背景，不行啊？
t_en: What's wrong? Can't a pretty girl have her own special effects?

t_ch: 知道你这人没个正形，看来我只好自问自答了。
t_en: I know you're never serious about anything, so I guess I'll just have to answer my own question.

t_ch: 因为一同走在花下的人？
t_en: Is it because of the person walking among the flowers?

t_ch: 你还蛮懂浪漫的嘛。
t_en: You're quite the romantic, aren't you?

t_ch: 不过，我要说，回~答~错~误~
t_en: But I have to say, wrong~ answer~

t_ch: 你谜语人的毛病又犯了？
t_en: Is your Riddler syndrome acting up again?

t_ch: 知道你这人没个正形，看来我只好自问自答了。
t_en: I know you're never serious about anything, so I guess I'll just have to answer my own question.

t_ch: 因为花总是<color=#dbc291ff>转瞬飘逝</color>啊。
t_en: Because flowers are always so <color=#dbc291ff>fleeting</color>.
Ah...

t_ch: 你自带的背景，没带走啊……
t_en: You left your own special effects behind...

t_ch: 她消失了。
t_en: She's gone.

t_ch: 幻月游戏…总是会出现出乎意料的人，出乎意料的事情。虽然这位绯英小姐说她只是一个观众，但是……
t_en: Unexpected people and unexpected things always make an appearance in the Phantasmoon Games... Although Miss Evanescia claims to be just a spectator...

t_ch: 能绘制面具并且令人成为谒者…怎么想她的身份都不可能普通。
t_en: As someone who can create masks and allow others to become Supplicants... there's no way she's just some ordinary girl.

t_ch: 也不知发生在{NICKNAME}身上的事情，究竟意味着什么。
t_en: I just don't know what to make of everything happening to {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 她看起来没什么恶意。
t_en: She doesn't seem to have any ill intentions.

t_ch: 妈，我不会被她带坏的。
t_en: Mom, I promise she won't lead me astray.

t_ch: 对不起，是我太操心了。
t_en: Sorry, I'm just being overprotective.

t_ch: 好了，咱们该出发了。
t_en: Alright, time for us to head out.

t_ch: 去哪儿？
t_en: Where to?

t_ch: 继续前进，去下一站的「匹诺康尼区」。
t_en: Let's continue forward, to the next stop: the Penacony Exhibition Area.

t_ch: 我有预感，破晓战队的挑战还没有结束，作为展会的主角，如果为了避免冲突而离开，落到所有观众眼中，或许会被视为不战而逃。
t_en: I have a feeling that the Daybreak Squadron's challenge isn't over yet. As the stars of this exhibition, if you left just to avoid conflict, all the spectators might think you chickened out and fled.

t_ch: 可恶，破晓战队这一出搞得我浑身不自在，总担心有人在偷偷盯着我们。
t_en: Darn it, this whole Daybreak Squadron business has got me on edge. Somehow I can't shake the feeling we're being watched.

t_ch: 说个好消息吧，至少{NICKNAME}不是孤立无援的，真珠派出的人正在赶往「匹诺康尼区」与我们汇合。
t_en: Here's some good news: At least {NICKNAME} isn't completely without help. Pearl's people are on their way to the Penacony Exhibition Area to join up with us.

t_ch: 如果我趴到轨道上，会不会被列车碾到？
t_en: Would I get run over by the Express if I lay down on the tracks?

t_ch: 会的，而且会被撞进二次元，说不定能转生异世界，成为勇者什么的！
t_en: Yep, and you'd get blasted straight into a comic book! Who knows, maybe you'll be reborn as some superhero or something!

t_ch: 那可真是幸福喔。
t_en: That's what I'd call true happiness.

t_ch: …真没想到，他们居然还原了列车飞驰撞击「神主日」的那一幕。
t_en: ...It's hard to believe they recreated the scene where the Express crashes into The Great Septimus!

t_ch: 明明前面几个展区都做得这么搞笑，这神主日倒挺还原。
t_en: All the previous exhibitions were so hilarious, but they really nailed The Great Septimus part.

t_ch: 正所谓黑化强三倍。
t_en: Like they say: Once you turn to the dark side, you get triple the power.

t_ch: 你什么意思？是不是在点本姑娘？
t_en: What's that supposed to mean? You taking a jab at me?

t_ch: 想叫老日来这儿玩。
t_en: I was thinking of inviting Sunny over here.

t_ch: 太坏了吧你！
t_en: That's just mean!

t_ch: 所以，真珠派来的人呢？
t_en: So, where's the person Pearl sent?

t_ch: 嗯？谁打来的？
t_en: Huh? Who's calling?

t_ch: 哟吼~你还好吧，小灰毛？
t_en: Yoohoo~ How ya doing, Gray Hair?

t_ch: 干嘛？
t_en: What do you want?

t_ch: 还活着。
t_en: Still alive.

t_ch: 不还面具！
t_en: Not giving back the mask!

t_ch: 我不会把面具还你的，死心吧你！
t_en: I'm not giving the mask back to you. Get over it!

t_ch: 我听说你和超级英雄们大打出手的事情啦，不过，出于惺惺相惜的对手情谊，我想给你提个醒——
t_en: I heard about your big fight with the superheroes. And since I actually respect you as a rival, I thought I'd give you a heads-up.

t_ch: 你可能以为自己在幻月游戏中大赢特赢，但大部分人未必是这么看的。
t_en: You might think you scored a massive win in the Phantasmoon Games, but most people probably don't see it that way.

t_ch: 总之，新闻正在播，去看看吧！
t_en: Anyway, the news is on right now. Why don't you go check it out?

t_ch: 就在刚才！正在举行的「星铁FES」展会现场，爆发了极其恶劣的暴力事件！
t_en: Just moments ago! An extremely violent incident broke out at the ongoing "Star Rail FEST" exhibition venue!

t_ch: 星穹列车的谒者{NICKNAME}，竟公然对深受乐园居民爱戴的本土英雄团队——「破晓战队」发动了残忍的袭击！ 现场一片混乱！
t_en: The Astral Express Supplicant {NICKNAME} brazenly launched a brutal attack on the beloved local heroes, the Daybreak Squadron! The scene descended into total chaos!

t_ch: 天啊！这太可怕了！这位无名客不是才击败了火花，拯救了绘世学院吗？
t_en: Oh my! This is terrifying! Didn't this Nameless just defeat Sparxie and save Graphia Academy?

t_ch: 难道这一场胜利还不够吗？难道{F#她}{M#他}也如同被击败的火花一样，威胁到我们所有人的安全？
t_en: Was that victory still not enough? Could {M#he,}{F#she,} like the defeated Sparxie, now be a threat to everyone's safety?

t_ch: 令人心寒！现场传来的视频片段中，{NICKNAME}宣称此举是为了向这个世界展示星穹列车的所谓「开拓精神」！
t_en: How chilling! In the video footage from the scene, {NICKNAME} claimed {M#his}{F#her} act was to demonstrate the so-called "Trailblazing Spirit" of the Astral Express to this world!

t_ch: 对上我，你们不可能胜利！
t_en: You don't stand a chance against me.

t_ch: 难道这就是{F#她}{M#他}口中的「开拓」？用蛮横无理的暴力手段，来打击乐园本土的守护者、践踏我们自己的英雄吗？
t_en: Is this what {M#he}{F#she} calls "the Trailblaze"? Using brute force and violence to strike down the guardians of this arcadia and trample over our own heroes?

t_ch: 这到底是…是{F#她}{M#他}一时冲动兽性大发？还是说，{F#她}{M#他}冷漠无情的本性终于彻底暴露？
t_en: Was it... a sudden violent outburst? Or was this the moment {F#her}{M#his} true heartless nature finally came to light?

t_ch: 满愿电视台将持续追踪报导这场骇人听闻的事件！请您锁定频道，切勿走开！
t_en: Fulwish TV will continue to follow this shocking incident! Stay tuned and don't go away!

t_ch: 哈哈，现在网络上也都传开啦~
t_en: Haha, it's all over the internet now~

t_ch: 有人说你是暴力狂，还有人认为是你搞出了鸽川血案，你就是告死魔二代。
t_en: Some say you're a violent maniac, others think you're behind the bloodbath in Dovebrook, that you're the second Herald of Death.

t_ch: 喂喂，请问此时此刻的你心情如何啊，如何啊？
t_en: Oopsie, how are you feeling right about now, hmmm?

t_ch: 你就幸灾乐祸吧你。
t_en: Go ahead and laugh all you want.

t_ch: 怎么会~作为著名网络主播，可怜的火花花一直倍受网络暴力的困扰啊~
t_en: How could I? As a famous streamer, poor little Sparxicle has always been troubled by constant cyberbullying~

t_ch: 还有个来自星穹列车的无名客给我好一顿线下暴力~嘤嘤。
t_en: And then there was some Nameless from the Astral Express who gave me quite the beating IRL~

t_ch: 这背后有人搞我。
t_en: Someone's definitely pulling strings behind my back.

t_ch: 当然啦，肯定是有人在背后装神弄鬼，煽动舆情。作为这一行的头部主播，火花花看一眼就知道啦。
t_en: Of course, someone's definitely pulling strings behind the scenes and stirring up drama. As a top streamer in this field, Sparxicle can spot these tricks from a mile away!

t_ch: 对了，你是不是还接受了电视台的新闻采访？
t_en: Oh right, didn't you also do a TV news interview?

t_ch: 我没说什么呀？
t_en: I didn't say anything in particular, did I?

t_ch: 你说了什么并不重要。重要的是，你说了。
t_en: It's not about what you said... It's that you said it.

t_ch: 该不会…？
t_en: Are you talking about...?

t_ch: 哟吼，当然会喔！
t_en: Yoohoo, you bet!

t_ch: 来来来，我发给你采访的视频吧！
t_en: Here, let me send you the interview video!

t_ch: 多的话我就不说了，既然你能打败花火大人…不对，是火花大人，我也不希望你在这几个跳梁小丑面前一败涂地。
t_en: I won't go any further, but since you managed to defeat Miss Sparkle... no, I mean Miss Sparxie, I don't want to see you embarrass yourself in front of those clowns.

t_ch: 加油吧，拜拜！
t_en: Good luck, see you around!

t_ch: 你好，{NICKNAME}！打扰了！我们是满愿电视台的！真幸运能在这儿碰到您！您现在有空吗？
t_en: Hi, {NICKNAME}! Sorry to bother you! We're with Fulwish TV! It's our lucky day running into you here! Do you have a moment?

t_ch: 简短点，我稍后还有安排。
t_en: Keep it brief, I've got plans later.

t_ch: 第一个问题：作为列车重新启程的站点，我想先请您谈谈自己对二相乐园的感想。
t_en: First question: Seeing as Planarcadia was the starting point of the Express's new voyage, how would you describe your impressions of this place?

t_ch: 二相乐园…人人都在追逐热点，寻找乐子。
t_en: Planarcadia... Everyone's chasing the latest trends, looking for fun.

t_ch: 有意思。幻月游戏的历史上，像您这样知名的银河大人物参与可是极其罕见的事。作为星穹列车的谒者，您在这场「游戏」中想要为这个世界带来怎样的改变？
t_en: Interesting. Throughout the history of the Phantasmoon Games, it's been extremely rare to have such a renowned cosmic figure as yourself participating. As the Astral Express's Supplicant, what kind of changes do you hope to bring to this world in these Games?

t_ch: 向大家展示「开拓」的力量，去改变这个世界！
t_en: Show everyone the strength of the Trailblaze, to change this world!

t_ch: 令人印象深刻的回答！说到这个，您加入游戏后率先击败了代表假面愚者的火花小姐。对于未来可能面临的本土谒者的挑战，您作何感想？
t_en: That's an impressive answer! Speaking of which, after joining the games, you immediately went to defeat Miss Sparxie, who represented the Masked Fools. What are your thoughts on potentially facing native Supplicants in the future?

t_ch: 其他的本土谒者…太危险了。我更愿意靠暴力打败他们。
t_en: The other native Supplicants... way too dangerous. I'd rather defeat them through violence.

t_ch: 说起本土的谒者，我们注意到「星铁FES」是由珠星财团为列车举办的欢迎仪式。有传言说公司也是列车的资助者，请问您这一次参与「游戏」代表的究竟是列车还是公司？
t_en: Speaking of local Supplicants, we've noticed that "Star Rail FEST" is Pearluxe Corp's way of rolling out the red carpet for the Express. There are rumors that the IPC is also sponsoring the Express. So, I have to ask: Are you representing the Express or the IPC in these Games?

t_ch: 说到底，公司的利益。真珠女士和珠星盛情邀请，我不是宾客，我是这里的主人。
t_en: At the end of the day, this is a festival for the IPC's interests. Madam Pearl and Pearluxe extended such a warm invitation. I'm not one of the guests. I'm the master of this place.

t_ch: 啊这…这、这这这！这根本就是恶意剪辑栽赃{NICKNAME}吧！太不要脸了！
t_en: W—Wait, what!? This... This is a totally malicious edit to frame {NICKNAME}! How shameless!

t_ch: 虽然每个字都是我说的…
t_en: Well, technically those were all my words...

t_ch: …确实，每个字都出自我的嘴巴。但拼凑起来，就变成了宣战发言。
t_en: ...Indeed, every word came from my mouth. But when pieced together, it turned into a declaration of war.

t_ch: 他们可真会断章取义…
t_en: They sure know how to twist other people's words...

t_ch: 十五年过去了，幻月游戏的竞争方式，发生了某种变化。破晓战队的挑衅，反倒成了烟雾弹…对手深谙如何操控舆论的利刃在台下出招。
t_en: Over these fifteen years, the nature of competition in the Phantasmoon Games has evolved. The Daybreak Squadron's taunts were just smoke and mirrors. The real game is being played in the shadows, where our opponents have mastered the art of weaponizing public opinion.

t_ch: 细想也是必然。毕竟这场「游戏」真正的主角，从来不是台上的谒者…而是那些目光所系的观众。
t_en: Come to think of it, it's only natural. After all, the true stars of the Games were never the Supplicants on stage... but rather the audience whose gazes they command.

t_ch: 确实，观众们现在可是热血沸腾，等着看{NICKNAME}大显神威呢…
t_en: Indeed, the audience is all fired up, waiting to see you work your magic, {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 不过嘛~我敢打赌，他们心底更想看到的，是破晓战队狠狠挫一挫星穹列车的锐气。
t_en: But you know what~ I bet what they really want to see deep down is the Daybreak Squadron taking the Astral Express down a peg or two.

t_ch: 哟，星穹列车的各位，又见面了。
t_en: Well, well, if it isn't the folks from the Astral Express. Fancy meeting you again.

t_ch: 网上的风暴…比你们阻止「火花大会」那一天，更猛烈数倍。
t_en: This storm online... is several times more intense than the day you stopped SparxiCon.

t_ch: 朽叶小姐！你也看到这些假新闻了吧？
t_en: Miss Kuchiba! You've seen all this fake news too, right?

t_ch: 你们来得有些晚了吧？
t_en: Aren't you guys a bit late for this?

t_ch: 抱歉，路上…有点小耽搁。自打进了展区，至少遇到七个家伙堵着我索要那个叫「瓦尔特」的签名。
t_en: Sorry, got a bit... held up on the way. Since I entered the exhibition area, at least seven folks stopped me asking for the autograph of this guy called Welt.

t_ch: 所以，瓦尔特是谁？
t_en: So, who is this Welt?

t_ch: 你们来做什么？
t_en: What are you here for?

t_ch: 真珠指派我们追踪共愿帮的灭门惨案…但种种可疑的蛛丝马迹，把线头从幸福微笑研究会一路牵上了…破晓战队。
t_en: Pearl assigned us to investigate the Synwish Syndicate massacre... but every suspicious thread we followed led us from the Research Society of Happy Smiles straight to... the Daybreak Squadron.

t_ch: 然后是那个在幕后编织蛛网的家伙——满愿。
t_en: And then there's the one pulling the strings behind the scenes: Fulwish.

t_ch: 满愿……？
t_en: Fulwish...?

t_ch: 怎么，听过这个名字？那就有意思了。
t_en: Oh? You know that name? Now this is getting interesting.

t_ch: 她是我的学妹，十五年前，她也是绘世学院现场唯一生还的学生。
t_en: She was my junior at school. Fifteen years ago, she was also the only student who survived at Graphia Academy.

t_ch: 好消息是，你这位学妹活得比谁都滋润。名下有电视台、慈善组织，家大业大，有钱有势。
t_en: The good news is, your junior is living better than anyone else. She owns TV stations, charity organizations, has a huge business empire, and wields both wealth and power.

t_ch: 坏消息嘛…她恐怕想在幻月游戏期间谋划点什么，最最糟糕的那种。我的直觉告诉我，共愿帮满门的血债…恐怕也得记在她的账上。
t_en: As for the bad news... She's probably plotting something for the Phantasmoon Games, and I mean the worst kind of something. My gut tells me that the Synwish Syndicate massacre... well, that's probably on her tab too.

t_ch: 真珠女士把不死途先生派来负责诸位的安全…当然，我明白，以无名客的身手本不需要加派人手保护，但真珠女士不想冒任何风险。
t_en: Madam Pearl sent Mr. Ashveil to ensure everyone's safety... Of course, I understand that with the Nameless' skills, there's no real need for extra protection. But Madam Pearl didn't want to take any chances.

t_ch: 简而言之，请各位把我当黑手套来用就成，不必客气。
t_en: Long story short, feel free to use me as muscle. No need to be shy about it.

t_ch: 那就拜托了。
t_en: I'm counting on you then.

t_ch: 所以我们还继续去帕姆塔顶吗？
t_en: So, are we still heading to the top of Pom-Pom tower?

t_ch: 我们应该继续前进。如果我猜的没错，破晓战队还会在那里进行第二次袭击。
t_en: We should keep moving forward. If my guess is right, the Daybreak Squadron will launch their second attack there.

t_ch: 抛下公平公正、和谐友好的幻想吧。打从此刻起，幻月游戏随时都可能要步十五年前的后尘了——
t_en: Forget about any fantasies of fairness and harmony. From this moment on, the Phantasmoon Games could follow in the footsteps of what happened fifteen years ago...

t_ch: 一旦这场战斗向流血的方向发展，恐惧会透过屏幕，成为某位谒者的愿力……
t_en: Once this battle turns bloody, fear will seep through the screen and become some Supplicant's Wishpower...

t_ch: 瞧，这就是现代社会的弊端，好事不出门，坏事传千里。
t_en: See, that's the problem with modern society. Good news stays home while bad news spreads like wildfire.

t_ch: 啊，这个展区的内容我知道，得亏看了三月小妹妹让给我的漫画。
t_en: Oh, I know about this exhibition area! Thanks to the comic Miss March gave me.

t_ch: 看不出来，你居然还看漫画。
t_en: Huh, wouldn't have pegged you for a comic book reader.

t_ch: 去祭拜恶水的路上顺道翻了翻，虽然那一册故事前不着村后不着店，倒是有趣的很。
t_en: I flipped through it on my way to pay respects to Caustide. Even though that volume's story was pretty random and all over the place, it was quite interesting.

t_ch: 一群毛茸茸的动物为了唤醒匹诺康尼的其他动物，占领了苏乐达汽水工厂……
t_en: A group of furry animals took over the SoulGlad soda factory to wake up the other animals in Penacony...

t_ch: 用苏乐达给列车补充燃料…这广告打得也太生硬了。
t_en: Using SoulGlad as fuel for the Express... Talk about forced product placement.

t_ch: 该开工了，名侦探。
t_en: Time to get to work, detective.

t_ch: 破晓战队…本以为他们也是列车的粉丝，没想到转眼间大家变成了敌人。
t_en: Daybreak Squadron... I thought they were fans of the Express too, but in the blink of an eye, we somehow became enemies.

t_ch: 也许这些人未必是敌人，他们可能受到了背后之人的挑唆。
t_en: They might not be the real enemy here. Someone could be pulling their strings from the shadows.

t_ch: 如果可以，我更希望说服他们退让——一旦开战，就会像火里倾倒燃油一样，在观众心中激起好战的情绪……
t_en: If possible, I'd rather persuade them to back down, since once a battle starts, it'll be like pouring fuel into a fire, stoking the audience's bloodlust...

t_ch: 这样的「游戏」只会陷入疯狂，我不希望十五年前的景象再度出现在这片土地上。
t_en: A Phantasmoon Game like that would only descend into madness. And I certainly do not want to see what happened fifteen years ago repeat itself on these lands.

t_ch: 星穹列车，我还以为你不会来了。呀，你带上了…帮手？
t_en: The Astral Express, just as I thought you weren't going to show up. Oh, you brought... help?

t_ch: 还是个老熟人…大叔，好久不见了。
t_en: And it's an old friend... Been a while, old man.

t_ch: 你认得他们？
t_en: You know them?

t_ch: 你们该不会是一伙的吧？
t_en: Don't tell me you're in cahoots with them?

t_ch: 别这么疑神疑鬼的。
t_en: Don't be so paranoid.

t_ch: 在鸽川生活过的人，彼此都有些缘分。既然你们把我当成老熟人，我不想摆出大人不可一世的态度来告诉你们该做什么、不该做什么。
t_en: People who have lived in Dovebrook share a special connection. Since you're treating me as an old friend, I don't want to act like some high-and-mighty adult telling you what you should and shouldn't do.

t_ch: 我只会告诉你们，眼下你们在干的事情，已经跨过了危险的边界…无论满愿给你们下达了什么指示，现在罢手，一切还来得及。
t_en: I'll only tell you this: What you're doing right now has already crossed a dangerous line... Whatever orders Fulwish gave you, there's still time to turn back if you stop now.

t_ch: 武志、希娜、星原……
t_en: Wilhelm, Theana, Lucius...

t_ch: 还有你，真弘。在我如此发自肺腑地告诫后，你依旧要站在满愿这一边吗？
t_en: And you, Magnus. After my heartfelt warning, do you still insist on taking Fulwish's side?

t_ch: 我…和他们是伙伴啊！
t_en: Th-They're my partners!

t_ch: 大叔，幻月游戏的谒者挑战不受任何约束，你无权阻止我们——
t_en: Listen up, old man! Supplicants' challenges during the Phantasmoon Games have no restrictions. That means you have no right to stop us...

t_ch: 就像…「告死魔」一样？
t_en: Like... the Herald of Death?

t_ch: 我们不是告死魔——这一次我们不是为了杀戮而来的！
t_en: We're not the Herald of Death, and we're definitely not here for bloodshed this time!

t_ch: 我们会向人们证明，我们才是能守护他们幸福的英雄！
t_en: We will prove to the people that we are true heroes who can protect their happiness!

t_ch: 星穹列车…这些天外来客，说自己从绝灭大君的手中拯救了银河…但谁知道真相呢？
t_en: The Astral Express... These visitors from beyond the sky claim they saved the cosmos from a Lord Ravager... but who knows what the truth really is?

t_ch: 所谓的「拯救银河」，也许只是公司的一个企划…就像曾经的我们一样，在电视里卖力地演出，努力想去安慰电视机前的孩子——
t_en: This so-called "saving the cosmos" might just be another scheme of the IPC... Just like us back then, putting on a show on TV, desperately trying to comfort the kids in front of the screen...

t_ch: 告诉那些孩子…告诉过去的自己，在告死魔来的时候，会有英雄挡在所有人面前的。
t_en: Tell those children... Tell my past self that, when the Herald of Death comes, there will be heroes who put themselves between everyone else and the threat.

t_ch: 队长……
t_en: Captain...

t_ch: 可是，十五年前我们这些孩子需要人保护的时候，星穹列车的无名客又在哪儿？！
t_en: But where were the Nameless of the Astral Express when we children needed protection fifteen years ago!?

t_ch: 小灰，别被他们骗了，别被这些光鲜亮丽的银河英雄骗了啊！
t_en: Gray, don't be fooled by these flashy cosmic heroes!

t_ch: 星穹列车根本不在意我们的幸福，他们像所有观光客一样来了又走…不！他们比观光客更无情！因为他们要践踏欢愉的仪式，要夺走乐园居民们的目光！
t_en: The Astral Express doesn't care about our happiness at all. They come and go like all tourists... No! They're even more heartless than tourists! Because they're here to trample on the Elation's ceremony and steal the arcadian people's attention!

t_ch: 他们把我们这些原住民对「英雄」的幻想，替换成了他们的模样，只为满足他们名叫「开拓精神」的虚荣心！
t_en: They replaced our fantasies of heroes with their own image, all to satisfy their vanity called "the Trailblazing spirit"!

t_ch: 告诉我，{NICKNAME}，你这辈子有没有哪怕一刻，体会过在黄昏的血地里发抖的感觉……
t_en: Tell me, {NICKNAME}, have you ever, even for a moment, felt what it's like to tremble on blood-soaked ground at dusk...

t_ch: 我只是看起来勇敢…
t_en: I only look brave...

t_ch: 我还记得自己在空间站面对末日兽的时刻……
t_en: I still remember that moment when I faced the Doomsday Beast on the space station...

t_ch: 每一次战斗，我都会恐惧。
t_en: There's not a single time I go into a fight that I'm not terrified.

t_ch: 我害怕失去伙伴…害怕死亡…我害怕的事情有很多。
t_en: I'm afraid of losing my companions... afraid of death... There are so many things that I fear.

t_ch: 你恨错人了。
t_en: You're directing your hatred at the wrong person.

t_ch: 你仇恨的不是星穹列车，你只是在恨你自己…那个年幼时无能为力，没法保护所有人的自己。但我想告诉你，无能为力从来都不是你的错。
t_en: It's not the Astral Express you hate. You're just hating yourself... that powerless child who couldn't protect everyone. But I want to tell you, being powerless was never your fault.

t_ch: 星穹列车宇宙第一！星穹列车宇宙最强！
t_en: The Astral Express is the GOAT! The Astral Express is number one in the universe!

t_ch: 废什么话！撕起来，打个头破血流！我要看到血流成河！
t_en: Quit yapping! Tear 'em to shreds! Beat 'em to a pulp! I want a bloodbath!

t_ch: 破晓战队，把这群外星佬揍趴下！
t_en: Daybreak Squadron, beat these alien punks to the ground!

t_ch: 闭嘴！都给我闭嘴！作为孩子，无能为力确实不是我的错。但我们…血涂游戏的遗孤们绝不会一直无能为力下去。
t_en: Shut up! All of you, shut up! As a kid, it wasn't my fault that I was powerless. But we... the orphans of the Bloodstained Games won't remain that way forever.

t_ch: 我们…经受了「幸福手术」的转变。我们战胜了过去那个弱小的自己，我们成了破晓战士！我们变强了！
t_en: We've... undergone the Happiness Surgery transformation. We've overcome our weak former selves and become Daybreak Warriors! We've grown stronger!

t_ch: 奇怪，明明已经抹除了痛苦…为什么我刚才还会那么害怕，还会有眼泪？
t_en: Strange... Even though our suffering was erased, why was I so scared just now? And why were there tears?

t_ch: 大哥，因为…这些痛苦一直都在！是时候战胜它了！是时候用幸福的力量，最后一次战胜它了！
t_en: Brother, that's only because... this pain has been here all along! It's time to overcome it! It's time to use the power of happiness to defeat it once and for all!

t_ch: 说的不错。让我们做该做的事情吧——
t_en: Well said. Then let's finish what needs to be done...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>从这些外来者手中，把哈托彼亚人心目中的英雄形象，夺回来！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Let's reclaim from these outsiders the image of heroes that the people of Ahatopia hold dear!</color>

t_ch: …真弘，你呢？
t_en: ...What about you, Magnus?

t_ch: 抱歉，不死途大哥，英雄是不能背叛同伴的！
t_en: Sorry, Mr. Ashveil, but a hero never betrays his companions!

t_ch: 我们是破晓战队，是四人同心、保护世界的战士，我不会让伙伴们还有那些支持我们的人失望。
t_en: We are the Daybreak Squadron, four warriors of one heart, united to protect the world. I won't let down my companions or those who believe in us.

t_ch: 我们才是真正的英雄。看看这座列车长的雕塑吧，它空有一副躯壳。哪怕是坐拥无数资源的珠星财团，也没法为它赋予生命。
t_en: We are the true heroes. Look at this statue of the conductor, it's just an empty shell. Even Pearluxe Corp, with countless resources at their disposal, can't breathe life into it.

t_ch: 但我们可以。就让我来证明给你们看吧——
t_en: But we can. Let me prove it to you...

t_ch: 你们要做什么？！
t_en: What are you guys going to do!?

t_ch: 别对列车长的雕像动手！
t_en: Don't touch the conductor's statue!

t_ch: 快阻止他们！别让他们打着星穹列车的招牌，败坏咱们的名声。
t_en: Stop them! Don't let them drag the Astral Express's name through the mud!

t_ch: 我将提供愿力，令它苏醒。
t_en: I shall provide the Wishpower to awaken it.

t_ch: 我将成为骨架，使它站立。
t_en: I shall become its skeleton and allow it to stand.

t_ch: 我将化作燃料，催它前进！
t_en: I shall turn into the fuel that drives it forward!

t_ch: 我将成为核心，令引擎奏响「永恒的喜乐」！
t_en: I shall become the core that makes the engine sing the song of Eternal Joy!

t_ch: 感谢乘坐本次列车，乐子神在上，祝您游览愉快。
t_en: Thank you for riding with us today. May The Laughter watch over you, and please enjoy your journey.

t_ch: 哇，展区入口挤满了列车粉丝……
t_en: Wow, the exhibition entrance is packed with Express fans...

t_ch: 快点快点，再晚就抢不到了！
t_en: Hurry up, hurry up! We'll miss out if we're late!

t_ch: 那几位是请来的Coser吗？
t_en: Are those hired cosplayers over there?

t_ch: 三、二、一。
t_en: Three, two, one...

t_ch: 三小只要永远在一起！
t_en: May the trio stay together forever!

t_ch: 《隔壁座的幻胧同学》…
t_en: Phantylia Who Sits Next to Me...

t_ch: 怎样，纯爱吧？
t_en: So, how's that for pure love, huh?

t_ch: 星穹列车，真的会给二相乐园带来幸福吗？
t_en: Will the Astral Express truly bring happiness to Planarcadia?

t_ch: 列车那个{F#女孩}{M#男孩}来了——快，准备一下！
t_en: That Express {M#boy}{F#girl} is here! Quick, get ready!

t_ch: 真是冠冕堂皇的回答…
t_en: What a pretentious answer...

t_ch: 没事，有这些素材就够了。
t_en: No worries, this material will do just fine.

t_ch: 嗨，{NICKNAME}，看这边！我在这边~
t_en: Hey {NICKNAME}, over here! I'm right here~

t_ch: 接下来要买什么呢…球棒浣熊、三月兔、汪汪丹的玩偶？
t_en: What should I get next... A Baseball Raccoon, March Bunny, or Woof Woof Dan plushie?

t_ch: 还是…让模糊老师给签个名？
t_en: Or... maybe I should get an autograph from Blurry?

t_ch: 各位，星穹列车的嘉宾即将入场，请准备好你们的欢呼！
t_en: Ladies and gentlemen, the guests from the Astral Express are about to make their entrance. Get ready to make some noise!

t_ch: 噢噢噢——
t_en: Yeaaaah!

t_ch: 炎枪！冲锋！
t_en: Flaming lance! Forward!

t_ch: 炎枪！冲锋！
t_en: Flaming lance! Forward!

t_ch: 欢迎乘坐绒绒号接驳列车！一起开拓未来帕！
t_en: Welcome aboard The Fluffy Shuttle Express! Together, we'll trailblaze into the future!

t_ch: 下一站「仙舟罗浮展区」。
t_en: Next stop: Xianzhou Luofu Exhibition Area.

t_ch: 乘客您好，绒绒号接驳列车即将起航。下一站，「仙舟罗浮展区」。
t_en: Welcome aboard, passengers! The Fluffy Shuttle Express is about to depart. Next stop: Xianzhou Luofu Exhibition Area.

t_ch: 观众们的情绪高涨，连愿力都凝结成了「点赞」的形态。
t_en: The audience is brimming with excitement. Their Wishpower is even crystallizing into the shape of "like" buttons.

t_ch: 收集它们，为列车充满燃料吧。
t_en: Collect them to fuel up the Express!

t_ch: 「仙舟罗浮展区」即将到站，请乘客坐稳扶好，耐心等待。
t_en: We're approaching the Xianzhou Luofu Exhibition Area. Please remain seated and hold on tight.

t_ch: 我来游览，我做苦工，我将水管疏通好，一切献给观众们……
t_en: I come to sight-see. I do hard labor. I fix these pipes... All for the audience...

t_ch: 终于搞定了！此时此刻，我无比想念丹恒！
t_en: Finally done! I've never missed Dan Heng as much as I do now!

t_ch: 幻月游戏是寻找最接近欢愉之人的仪式！
t_en: The Phantasmoon Games are a ceremony to find those closest to Elation!

t_ch: 我们会向所有人展现破晓战士的英姿！
t_en: We'll show everyone the heroism of the Daybreak Warriors!

t_ch: 好厉害的一击！再来啊！
t_en: A powerful hit! Come at me again!

t_ch: 我们的身体经受过转变，不会有事的！
t_en: Our bodies have been transformed, so we'll be just fine!

t_ch: 对上我，你们不可能胜利！
t_en: You don't stand a chance against me.

t_ch: 乘客您好，绒绒号接驳列车即将起航。下一站，「匹诺康尼展区」。
t_en: Welcome aboard, passengers! The Fluffy Shuttle Express is about to depart. Next stop: Penacony Exhibition Area.

t_ch: 加油！星穹列车！
t_en: Let's go, Astral Express!

t_ch: 星穹列车一定是公司派来的狗！
t_en: The Astral Express? Just another IPC lapdog!

t_ch: 为了二相乐园，加油！破晓战队。
t_en: For Planarcadia! Let's go, Daybreak Squadron!

t_ch: 「匹诺康尼展区」即将到站，请乘客坐稳扶好，耐心等待。
t_en: We're approaching the Penacony Exhibition Area. Please remain seated and hold on tight.

t_ch: 要想往上走，得先给接驳的列车「加足燃料」。
t_en: To move forward, we'll need to "fuel up" the shuttle Express first.

t_ch: 来吧，让我们给列车「补充燃料」吧！
t_en: C'mon, let's "fuel up" the Express!

t_ch: 准备好了吗，列车要发车了！
t_en: Ready to roll? The Express is about to depart!

t_ch: 看，列车的人来了！
t_en: Look, the Express people are here!

t_ch: 快，躲远点，万一两边打起来伤到就惨了。
t_en: Quick, stay back! It'd be terrible if you got caught in the crossfire.

t_ch: 星穹列车，我们等你很久了！
t_en: Astral Express, we've been waiting for you for quite a while!

t_ch: 清理掉…垃圾，大家都…快乐！
t_en: Clean up... the trash, and everyone will... be happy!

t_ch: 不干净的…不快乐的…统统…扫除！
t_en: The unclean... and the unhappy... Sweep it... all away!

t_ch: 它真的动起来了！是阿哈赐予我们的力量！
t_en: It's really moving! This is the power bestowed upon us by Aha!

t_ch: 我一定会阻止你们！
t_en: I will stop you at all costs!

t_ch: 我绝不容许你们用列车长的形象肆意破坏！
t_en: I won't let you trash the conductor's image like this!

t_ch: 你们听见了吗？阿哈在呼唤我们！哈哈，我们不必再恐惧了！
t_en: Did you hear that? Aha is beckoning us! Haha, we don't have to be afraid anymore!

t_ch: 让笑容传染！让笑声永恒！哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Let smiles spread! Let laughter be eternal! HAHAHAHAHA!

t_ch: 你们真的疯了……
t_en: You guys are seriously nuts...

t_ch: 约好了…要保护…乐园…
t_en: We promised... to protect... the arcadia...

t_ch: 污垢…痛苦…好多…清除痛苦！大家都！笑起来！
t_en: Filth... pain...so much... eliminate pain! Everyone! Smile!

t_ch: 星穹列车，只是公司的一条狗！
t_en: The Astral Express is nothing but the IPC's lapdog!

t_ch: 没关系，我们已经处理过一条公司狗了！不介意再多来几条！
t_en: No worries, we've already dealt with one of them! Won't mind handling a few more!

t_ch: 你说什么……？
t_en: What did you say...?

t_ch: 这次…应该打趴下了吧！
t_en: Surely... That did the trick this time!

t_ch: 重启…自我修复…要——带来幸福！
t_en: Reboot... self-repair... must bring happiness!

t_ch: 快，准备一下！
t_en: Quick, get ready!

t_ch: 看这边！我在这边~
t_en: Over here! I'm over here~

t_ch: 太可爱了，球棒浣熊。
t_en: Aww, Baseball Raccoon is so adorable!

t_ch: 你怎么把瘦脸特效关了？
t_en: Why'd you turn off the face slimming filter?

t_ch: 兄弟，票子要伐？
t_en: Yo buddy, need a ticket?

t_ch: 你看看我们是做什么的？
t_en: Look at what we do!

t_ch: 跟我们走一趟吧…
t_en: Come with us...

t_ch: 你居然认不出这角色吗？
t_en: Wait, you don't recognize this character?

t_ch: 敢问，他扮演的是？
t_en: May I ask what role is he playing?

t_ch: 仙舟第一高手，范勇
t_en: Fanyong, the GOAT in Xianzhou.

t_ch: 球棒浣熊，你把垃圾藏哪儿了？
t_en: Baseball Raccoon, where'd you hide the trash?

t_ch: 投降吧，外面全都是列车长…
t_en: Give it up, you're surrounded by conductors...

t_ch: 我是不会告诉你们的！
t_en: I'm not telling you anything.

t_ch: 这尾巴好逼真啊…
t_en: Wow, this tail looks so real...

t_ch: 为了你，我变成狼人模样～
t_en: I transformed myself into a werewolf, just for you~

t_ch: 好可爱的狗狗…
t_en: What a cute puppy...

t_ch: 博物馆双子星
t_en: Museum Gemini

t_ch: 双子星带你逛遍「星铁FES」
t_en: Gemini Takes You on a Tour of Star Rail FEST

t_ch: 满愿电视台
t_en: Fulwish TV

t_ch: 「星铁FES」现场直播
t_en: "Star Rail FEST" Live

t_ch: 满愿电视台
t_en: Fulwish TV

t_ch: 「星铁FES」现场直播
t_en: "Star Rail FEST" Live

t_ch: 我们…还活着吗？
t_en: Are we... still alive?

t_ch: 这里…是什么地方？
t_en: What... is this place?

t_ch: …这是到地府了吗？
t_en: ...Are we in purgatory?

t_ch: 啊呸呸呸！你可别胡说。
t_en: Hey! Don't say things like that!

t_ch: 我记得失控的列车带我们向下坠落，穿过了一座废弃的隧道。按理说，这里应该是地底深处的某个车站了。
t_en: I remember the out-of-control Express taking us down and through an abandoned tunnel. Theoretically speaking, this should be a station deep underground.

t_ch: 但这些破碎的建筑，远处古怪的空间，我们真是在地底车站吗？二相乐园的地底，有这么大的空间？
t_en: But what's with all these ruined buildings and that weird space in the distance? Is this really an underground station? A place this big exists beneath Planarcadia?

t_ch: 也许，这儿已不在现实中了。我们可能因为某些不知名的原因掉进了「画中世界」的某处。
t_en: Perhaps we're no longer in reality. We may have landed somewhere within the World in Canvas for unknown reasons.

t_ch: 那，咱们还回得去吗？
t_en: Th—Then, can we still make it back?

t_ch: 我们得尽快找齐所有人，离开这儿。
t_en: We need to find everyone and get out of here as soon as possible.

t_ch: 不死途先生他们人呢？
t_en: Where's Mr. Ashveil and the others?

t_ch: …看，我们重生了？我们…果然和共愿帮那样的垃圾不同。
t_en: ...We've been reborn? See, I knew we weren't like those Synwish Syndicate trash.

t_ch: 是啊，大哥，我们是英雄！我们是正义！我们是不死的幸福！
t_en: You're right, Red! We're heroes! We are justice! We are the undying happiness!

t_ch: 如果你们是正义，那就让我来扮演必要的恶人。
t_en: If you are justice, then forgive me for playing the necessary evil.

t_ch: 各位，不要再执迷不悟了！再这样下去，你们真的会……
t_en: Everyone, please, this has to stop! If this goes on, you'll all...

t_ch: 笑一笑吧！来到永恒的极乐，真正的幸福。
t_en: Just smile! Embrace the everlasting bliss and true happiness.

t_ch: 拜托了，你们听我一句话吧。
t_en: I beg you... Please listen to me.

t_ch: 只要跟朽叶小姐回去，去「异常防御部」，向他们解释发生了什么，一切都还来得及。
t_en: It's not too late. We can still go back to the Department of Aberration Defense with Miss Kuchiba and explain everything.

t_ch: 放弃吧，现在的他们只是会对快乐做出反应的生物而已。
t_en: It's no use. They are just creatures that can only react to joy now.

t_ch: 所有人都会幸福，所有人都不会死去，笑吧，笑吧。
t_en: All shall be blessed with happiness! All shall live forever! So smile, and laugh...

t_ch: 笑声会传染到整个二相乐园。
t_en: And let our laughter infect all of Planarcadia.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}前辈，还有不死途大哥，我求求你们，劝劝他们几个……
t_en: My senior {NICKNAME}, Mr. Ashveil... I'm begging you, please tell them that it's not too late...

t_ch: 抱歉…太迟了。
t_en: I'm sorry... I'm afraid it is.

t_ch: 我无能为力。
t_en: There's nothing I can do.

t_ch: 我也没法原谅他们。
t_en: I can't forgive them either.

t_ch: 真弘，让开。
t_en: Move aside, Magnus.

t_ch: 大哥，再给我一点时间，你也知道的，他们都是好人……
t_en: Please just give me another minute! You know they're good people...

t_ch: 你最好让开！
t_en: It's best if you just move aside.

t_ch: 真正的英雄，绝不会放弃自己的同伴！
t_en: A true hero never abandons his friends!

t_ch: 如果我现在要杀死他们，你会来阻止我吗？还是视而不见？
t_en: If I try to kill them now, will you stop me? Or will you turn a blind eye?

t_ch: 阻止不死途。
t_en: (Stop Ashveil)

t_ch: 我能理解你的好意，但他们有他们的选择，我也有我的。
t_en: I get where you're coming from, but they've made their choices, and so have I.

t_ch: 说到底，这样对他们真的好吗？
t_en: After all, are they really better off like this?

t_ch: 见证到最后。
t_en: See it through to the end.

t_ch: 死以生祭，债以血偿。
t_en: A tribute of life unto death, and a debt paid in blood.

t_ch: 共愿帮…作为盘踞鸽川的帮派曾引发大规模械斗，导致多人重伤，并犯有抢劫、敲诈等多项罪行。
t_en: The Synwish Syndicate... A gang that once ruled the streets of Dovebrook, they sparked massive turf wars that left many with grievous injuries, and racked up charges for robbery, extortion, and a whole laundry list of other crimes.

t_ch: 池波与恶水，他们并非什么善类…这辈子干的好事就像污水潭上偶然泛起几个漂亮的肥皂泡。
t_en: Polwave and Caustide... They were far from saints. Any good deeds they did in their lifetimes were just like a few pretty soap bubbles floating up from a stagnant pool of filth.

t_ch: 所以他们被英雄讨伐了，他们和这个世界，都变得幸福了！
t_en: That's why we brought them down! They, and this whole world, have now become happier!

t_ch: 没错，他们也许有罪要赎，但这不是你们像砸碎玩具般虐杀了他们的理由。
t_en: Yes, they may have had sins to atone for, but that doesn't justify your murdering them as if they were just toys.

t_ch: 多谢这位英雄出手相救，我是赤焰战士，是破晓战队的队长。请问——喂，大叔你怎么就走了？
t_en: Thank you for your aid. I am the Blazeweaver Warrior, captain of the Daybreak Squadron. May I— Hey, where are you going?

t_ch: 我们没有过家家呀，大家都笑得很高兴嘛，哈哈哈哈。
t_en: Play? We're not playing. Everyone's just laughing along happily, hahahaha!

t_ch: 侦探大叔，你知道巡海游侠吗？据说是一群在宇宙里行侠仗义的英雄，照这样说，我们是不是也算城市里的游侠？
t_en: Mr. Detective, do you know about the Galaxy Rangers? I heard they are a group of righteous heroes roaming the universe. In that sense... are we the city's Rangers?

t_ch: 啊，不死途先生，我想请你帮我们一个忙——
t_en: Ah, Mr. Ashveil! Could you do us a favor...

t_ch: <size=28>哈哈哈哈哈哈哈——</size>
t_en: <size=28>HAHAHAHAHAHAHAH—</size>

t_ch: 一股熟悉的味道…呵，原来如此。
t_en: This familiar scent... Ah, I see.

t_ch: 你做了什么……
t_en: Wh—What have you done...

t_ch: 记住今天发生的一切，真弘。你随时都可以向我复仇，我绝不阻拦。
t_en: Remember what happened today, Magnus. You may seek revenge anytime. I won't stop you.

t_ch: 黑影如退潮般缩回不死途脚下，地面上只留下灰烬一人孤独的身影——他的三位同伴，连同他们被黑影连接过的影子，已在黑影散去时被彻底吞没，再无踪影。
t_en: The shadows withdrew beneath Ashveil's feet like a receding tide, leaving Cinderborne standing alone in the wake of the darkness. As the gloom dispersed, it utterly subsumed his three companions, along with the shadows that tethered them to it, vanishing them without a trace.

t_ch: 小灰，你还好吧？
t_en: Gray... Are you okay?

t_ch: 我、我们都做了些什么啊……
t_en: Wh—What have we done...

t_ch: 如此一来，「新告死魔」算是结案了。
t_en: And so concludes the New Herald of Death case.

t_ch: 没有证据，也没有口供…这份案卷该怎么写结案陈词呢？
t_en: But without evidence or testimony... how am I going to write the closing statement for this report?

t_ch: 所以破晓战队真是凶手？
t_en: So did the Daybreak Squadron really do it?

t_ch: 关于这点，除了不死途本人外，谁也无法回答你。
t_en: No one but Ashveil will ever know.

t_ch: 但我选择相信他。这个男人的「影子」…只对罪孽深重的目标亮出獠牙。
t_en: But I choose to believe him. His "shadow"... only bares its fangs at those drenched in sin.

t_ch: 虽然不知他这份力量的来由，但他确实好几次帮「异常防御部」解决了麻烦的案件。
t_en: I don't know how he came upon such power, but it did help the Department of Aberration Defense crack several hard cases.

t_ch: 很好，我正发愁没能照顾好几位的人身安全呢，你们命挺硬啊。
t_en: Glad to see that you're all made of tough stuff. I was just fretting over failing my chaperone duties.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>巡海游侠之首，拉曼查</color>。我听过这个名字，但这应该是许久之前的传奇了……
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>La Mancha, leader of the Galaxy Rangers...</color> I've heard about you, but only in legends past.

t_ch: 见多识广啊，无名客。很多年过去了，我还以为这个名字已经被外界忘得差不多了，正打算开始全新的人生呢……
t_en: Then you're well-informed, Nameless. I'd expected the name to be long forgotten by now. So much for turning over a new leaf...

t_ch: 你刚刚使用的是什么力量？
t_en: What was that power you used just now?

t_ch: 少儿不宜的力量。
t_en: A power for grown-ups only.

t_ch: 如果不是像我一样被迫，你最好不要问，不要主动探寻，也不要沾上它。
t_en: It's best that you don't ask about it, seek it, or get involved with it unless you're forced to, like I was.

t_ch: 你认识波提欧和乱破吗？
t_en: Do you know Boothill and Rappa?

t_ch: 你说的难道是…银枪•修罗和缭乱•忍侠殿下？！
t_en: You mean... the esteemed Silvergun Shura and Dazzling Ninja Hero!?

t_ch: 当然不认识。我已经隐退很久了。我认得的还活着的游侠，一个把我当叛徒，一个把我当猎物。
t_en: Of course not. I retired a long time ago. Out of the Rangers I know who are still alive, one sees me as a traitor, the other as prey.

t_ch: 有言在先，我希望各位忘掉自己刚才听到的名字。此时此刻，在这个名为二相乐园的世界里，我是侦探「不死途」，仅此而已。
t_en: Just so we're clear, I want you all to forget the name you just heard. Right here and now, in this world called Planarcadia, I am just Detective "Ashveil."

t_ch: 与其对我的身份究根探底，或者怜悯刚刚死去的那三个罪犯…不如先想想怎么离开这里——早听说乐园的地下深处有不干净的东西，真奇怪，这里的人居然能睡得安稳。
t_en: Instead of obsessing over my identity or pitying the three dead criminals, I advise you to work on a way out of this place first. I've long heard rumors about unsavory things hidden deep beneath the arcadia. It's strange how the people here can sleep so soundly.

t_ch: 列车广播把这里唤作「众神嗤笑之地」…我不记得地图上有过这样的站点。
t_en: The train broadcast called this place the "Land of Sneering Gods"... I don't think I've ever seen this station on a map.

t_ch: 是不是…咱们有可能被困在这儿一辈子？
t_en: Are we... going to be trapped here forever?

t_ch: 不死途先生，你似乎从一开始就胸有成竹，即使置身于如此怪异的场所，也毫不担心自己的安危。
t_en: Mr. Ashveil, despite being at such a bizarre location, you've been oddly confident and unconcerned over your safety since the very beginning.

t_ch: 你真的对这个地方一无所知？
t_en: Do you truly know nothing about this place?

t_ch: 呵，这就是商业机密了。
t_en: I'm afraid that's classified information.

t_ch: 再者说，我只是贯彻了一位私家侦探的职业素养而已——相信自己的雇主。
t_en: Besides, I'm simply doing what any professional private investigator would do: trust my employer.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，把真珠送你的东西拿出来吧。
t_en: It's time to show us the trinket Pearl gave you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 什么？
t_en: What?

t_ch: 你是说…那个？
t_en: You mean... that thing?

t_ch: 真珠不是送了你们一枚筹码吗？只要她能靠着那东西定位到你们，我们的安全就有保障。
t_en: Come on... Didn't Pearl give you a chip? We're in good hands as long as she can track your location with that thing.

t_ch: （果然又是追踪器……）
t_en: (A tracking device... again.)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！
t_en: {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！
t_en: {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 来，看向这边，慢慢地走过来。
t_en: Come. This way. Come slowly.

t_ch: 是的，就在这道路的尽头，来吧，我呼唤你。
t_en: Yes, at the end of this path. Come. I beckon you.

t_ch: 你们有没有听到什么声音啊？
t_en: Did you hear that?

t_ch: 来吧，来到我的身边。
t_en: Come. Come to me.

t_ch: 来吧，拥抱这曼妙的世界，来吧，抵达我的身边。
t_en: Come. Embrace this wondrous world. Come to my side.

t_ch: 你想要去往更深处，与我融为一体。喜悦，正反馈，大脑皮层闪烁的香甜体验，温柔，曼妙。
t_en: You want to go further, deeper. Become one with me. The joy, the positive feedback... Sweet synaptic flickers on your cortex. Gentle. Wonderful.

t_ch: 听，它在呼吸，在沉睡，在呜咽，也在狞笑。
t_en: Listen. It's breathing, slumbering, whimpering, and grinning.

t_ch: 温暖，温柔，温暖，温柔，温暖，温柔。
t_en: Warm. Gentle. Warm. Gentle. Warm. And gentle.

t_ch: 我就是你，你就是我，来吧，拥抱这原初的喜悦。
t_en: I am you, and you are me. Come. Embrace this primordial joy.

t_ch: 用生命换取一张车票，登上前往终点的列车。
t_en: Life, in exchange for a boarding pass on the Express toward the end.

t_ch: 与我合为一体，成为我的一部分，成为我的……
t_en: Become one with me. Become a part of me. Become mine...

t_ch: 去到更深处！我想过去！
t_en: Let's go deeper! I want to go over there!

t_ch: 来吧，来吧，来吧，来吧，就是这样，踏出脚步！
t_en: Come. Come. Come. Come! Just like that, STEP FORWARD!

t_ch: 踏出脚步。
t_en: Step forward.

t_ch: 踏出脚步。
t_en: Step forward.

t_ch: 踏出脚步。
t_en: Step forward.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，别再往前了。
t_en: That's far enough, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 侦探不知何时来到你的身边，他的手杖拦在你的面前，耳畔的低语也就此终止。
t_en: The detective appears at your side before you even notice, his cane blocking your path. Just like that, the whispers in your ear fall silent.

t_ch: 在这个世界办案，我的一大原则就是——抑制自己的好奇心，不要涉足与案件无关的事物，尤其是那些看上去就异常凶险的东西。
t_en: My golden principle while working on cases in this world is to keep my curiosity in check and not get involved with matters beyond the case itself... especially things that already look considerably dangerous.

t_ch: 不过…沉睡在这深处的东西，却异常眼熟啊。
t_en: However, the thing that slumbers in the deep here does look awfully familiar...

t_ch: 大家都去哪儿了？
t_en: Where did everyone go?

t_ch: 更深的地方，有谁在叫我……
t_en: There's someone calling for me from some place deeper...

t_ch: 来吧，来吧。
t_en: Come. Come here.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，往这边来。
t_en: This way, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，哈哈哈哈。
t_en: Hahaha. Hahahaha.

t_ch: 这儿呢，往前走。
t_en: Over here. Keep going forward.

t_ch: 我刚刚怎么……
t_en: Why did I just—

t_ch: 与「火花大会」的闹剧结束后不久……
t_en: Shortly after the SparxiCon fiasco came to an end...

t_ch: …三月小姐，请直视我的双眼。就这样，很好。
t_en: ...Miss March, please look straight into my eyes. Just like that, perfect.

t_ch: 接下来请模仿我的语气，跟随我念诵下列句子——
t_en: Now, I'll need you to repeat these next few lines after me, and do so in the same tone of voice:

t_ch: 啊？好、好的。
t_en: Huh? O-Okay.

t_ch: 「天空是蓝色的，而非火花斑斓的颜色。」
t_en: "The sky is blue, not a dazzling display of sparks."

t_ch: 天空是蓝色的，而非火花斑斓的颜色。
t_en: The sky is blue, not a dazzling display of sparks.

t_ch: 「喧嚣的火花纵然可以照亮夜幕，但却无法胜过群星长久的沉默。」
t_en: "Though dazzling sparks may light up the night sky, they can never outshine the eternal silence of stars."

t_ch: 啊，这算是长难句了吧？喧嚣的火花纵然可以照亮夜幕，呃…却无法胜过群星长久的沉默？
t_en: Are you kidding? That's one sentence? Okay, um... "Though dazzling sparks may light up the night sky, um... they can never outshine the eternal silence of stars?"

t_ch: 很好。
t_en: Very good.

t_ch: …很好。
t_en: ...Very good.

t_ch: 「网络是心智的脐带也是排泄孔，透过它，人类对欢愉的渴求诞生了扭曲的火花。」
t_en: "The internet is both an umbilical cord and a waste duct for the mind, through which humanity's thirst for Elation gave birth to the twisted Sparxie."

t_ch: 欸！？这、这话也太刺激了吧？要不，让{NICKNAME}说吧？
t_en: Whoa there! That's a bit much... Maybe {NICKNAME} can be the one to say it?

t_ch: 这是在干什么？
t_en: What are you guys up to?

t_ch: 这是什么虎狼之词？
t_en: What kind of crazy talk is that?

t_ch: 这是按《智人及智械基准情感检测》的规则，我临时编撰的几句测试句。
t_en: These are test sentences I improvised according to the guidelines from the Human and Intellitron Emotional Baseline Test.

t_ch: 当你念到「火花」时，我会留神那一刻你的微表情和语气变化，来确认你是否存在被模因病毒感染的可能……
t_en: I carefully observe the subject's micro-expressions and tone changes at the moment they say the name "Sparxie" to check if they are infected by a memetic virus...

t_ch: 那么，我通过测试了吧？
t_en: So, I passed the test, right?

t_ch: 你的反应这么有趣，显然用不着我担心了。之后如果发现自己有沉迷网络直播的后遗症，可以联系「异常防御部」的工作人员，我们会为你提供一系列行为矫正治疗。
t_en: Given how fascinating your reaction was, I clearly don't need to worry about you. Should you find yourself experiencing any livestream addiction withdrawal symptoms later, feel free to contact the Department of Aberration Defense staff. We'll provide you with a series of corrective behavioral treatments.

t_ch: 朽叶小姐，总感觉你操作起这一切来驾轻就熟的，之前也发生过类似的事情吗？
t_en: You're handling this like a real pro, Miss Kuchiba. Has this kinda thing happened before?

t_ch: 「幻月游戏」的过程中会发生什么情况，是完全无法预料的。曾经有一位谒者将真话与谎言的定义颠倒了过来，差一点引发大规模的内乱。
t_en: It's impossible to predict what will happen during the Phantasmoon Games. Once, a Supplicant reversed the definitions of truth and lies, which nearly caused massive civil unrest.

t_ch: 打那之后，模因治疗就被纳入了「异常防御部」安全应急对策中。
t_en: After that incident, we incorporated memetic treatment into the Department of Aberration Defense's emergency safety protocols.

t_ch: 虽然这次「火花大会」并未造成什么人员伤亡，但如果{NICKNAME}没能阻止火花播撒病毒，她也许会变成「祸」级危害标准的灾异。
t_en: "SparxiCon" didn't cause any casualties this time. But if {NICKNAME} hadn't stopped Sparxie from spreading the virus, she might have turned into a Calamity-level Aberration.

t_ch: 祸级…是多大的危害？
t_en: Calamity-level... just how dangerous is that?

t_ch: 若没有遏制对策，「祸」级灾异会在扩散过程中摧毁数十座城市…这样的影响范围。
t_en: Without proper containment measures, a Calamity-level Aberration can destroy dozens of cities as it spreads... That's the scale we're talking about.

t_ch: 灾异？
t_en: Aberration?

t_ch: 这是「异常防御部」的称呼，通常是指那些受有愿力，且力量失控的幻造种。不过时间一久，但凡是产生危害的存在都被冠以这个名字。
t_en: That's the Department of Aberration Defense's term for them. It usually refers to imagenae infused with Wishpower who have lost control and begun to run amok. Over time, though, it's become a label that gets slapped onto any hazardous entity.

t_ch: 我算是什么级？
t_en: So what level of Aberration am I?

t_ch: …说什么呢，你是「灾异」吗？虽然戴上面具的你，样子确实怪里怪气的。
t_en: ...You, an Aberration? What're you talking about? Though I gotta say, you do look pretty weird with that mask on.

t_ch: 你不会是《银河战力党》的玩家吧？「异常防御部」的灾害评级可不是什么卡牌游戏的战力等级。
t_en: Don't tell me you're a Cosmicon Collective player? The Department of Aberration Defense's hazard ratings are nothing like the power ratings in some card game.

t_ch: 行了，检查程序算是走完了。如果{NICKNAME}对「灾异的危害等级」感兴趣，可以看看这份文件——记住咯，在幻月游戏期间造成上述量级的破坏，可是要被当作灾异讨伐的。
t_en: Right then, that's all for the required check-up. If you're interested in "Aberration Calamity Threat Levels" and how they're classified, you might want to take a look at this document. However, do bear in mind that causing damage of the aforementioned scale during the Phantasmoon Games will cause you to be classified as an Aberration... and dealt with accordingly.

t_ch: 在离开前，我还有一件事要知会{NICKNAME}。还记得担任你们导游的林登•斯科特吗？他遇害身亡了。
t_en: Before I leave, there's one more thing I need to tell you, {NICKNAME}. Remember Lyndon Skott, the man who served as your tour guide? He was murdered.

t_ch: …什么？
t_en: ...What?

t_ch: 斯科特死了？你们搞错了吧？
t_en: Skott's dead? No way. You guys sure about that?

t_ch: 是啊，我们认识的这位先生可是…呃，一个很有韧性的对手。
t_en: Yeah! The Skott we knew was... uh, a really tenacious opponent!

t_ch: 不，死者的身份证明和遗传信息都与斯科特先生匹配。你说他曾是你们的对手？
t_en: We're sure. Both the ID and genetic information of the deceased match that of Mr. Skott's. You said he was once your opponent?

t_ch: 他得罪谁了？
t_en: Who'd he tick off this time?

t_ch: 虽然回想斯科特先生过去的做派，他应该得罪过不少人，但总觉得都不至于是要起杀心的深仇大恨吧？
t_en: Though, given how he's behaved, he's definitely rubbed a lot of people the wrong way, but I doubt any of it was serious enough to get him killed, right?

t_ch: 看来你们对他的了解不浅啊。
t_en: Seems like you are quite familiar with him.

t_ch: 啊，你该不会…怀疑我们吧？斯科特先生在我们心里算不上什么朋友，但我们绝不至于对他动手。
t_en: Ah! You don't... suspect us, do you? I wouldn't exactly call Skott a friend, but we'd never do anything like that to him.

t_ch: 小妹妹，别紧张，我可什么都还没问呢。
t_en: Easy there, young lady. I haven't even started asking questions yet.

t_ch: 大名鼎鼎的列车英雄，当然不至于对一位和自己有过节的公司小职员动手——最重要的是，你们两位都有不在场证明。
t_en: Of course there's no way the renowned heroes of the Express would harm some lowly IPC employee simply because they had a problem with him. More importantly, both of you have solid alibis.

t_ch: 初步推测这起凶案可能和「幻月游戏」有关。我把这件事通报给你们，是想提醒二位务必小心。「幻月游戏」可不是什么打发时间、放松心情的电子游戏。
t_en: The initial results of our investigation suggest his murder might be connected to the Phantasmoon Games. I'm informing you both of this to warn you to be extremely careful. The Phantasmoon Games are far from a simple game intended for passing the time or relaxation.

t_ch: 无论如何，{NICKNAME}，我祝你得偿所愿。告辞了。
t_en: Anyway, I wish you success, {NICKNAME}. Farewell.

t_ch: 斯科特，居然…我都有点不敢相信。但朽叶小姐通报了，想必这是真的。
t_en: Skott? Could he actually... I just can't believe it! But it was Miss Kuchiba who told us, so... it must be true.

t_ch: 幻月游戏，可怕。{NICKNAME}，你怎么看啊？
t_en: So, the Phantasmoon Games... pretty frightening, huh? What's your take, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 我不太好受。
t_en: I'm not feeling so good...

t_ch: 嗯，我明白。
t_en: Yeah, I understand what you mean.

t_ch: 斯科特这人时不时会从哪儿冒出来给咱们制造一点麻烦…但，他比起敌人，我觉得更像是我们的朋友，打引号那种。
t_en: Skott pops up now and then to give us a bit of trouble... but I'd say he's more of a "friend" than an enemy, if you know what I mean.

t_ch: 我想找出真相。
t_en: I wanna find out the truth.

t_ch: 是啊。虽然斯科特先生总是时不时会从哪儿冒出来给咱们制造一点麻烦…但，他突然不明不白地死在了幻月游戏中，我也会觉得于心不忍。
t_en: Yeah! Even though Skott pops up now and then to give us a bit of trouble... I still feel bad about him dying so suddenly during the Phantasmoon Games like this, and without even knowing why...

t_ch: 我没什么感觉…
t_en: I don't care at all...

t_ch: 啊？真的吗？
t_en: Huh? Really?

t_ch: 虽然斯科特先生总是时不时会从哪儿冒出来给咱们制造一点麻烦…但，我觉得他比起敌人，有时候更像是我们的朋友，打引号那种。
t_en: Even though Skott pops up now and then to give us a bit of trouble... I'd still say he's usually more of a "friend" than an enemy, if you know what I mean.

t_ch: 如果凶手是冲幻月游戏来的，也许很快就会成为我们的敌人。
t_en: If the killer is here for the Phantasmoon Games, they might become our enemy soon.

t_ch: 幻月游戏…唉……
t_en: The Phantasmoon Games...

t_ch: 干嘛呀？
t_en: Hey, what's that for?

t_ch: 小小年纪，唉声叹气！
t_en: You're way too young to sigh like that!

t_ch: 唉，得亏姬子姐把这事托付给咱们俩…谁能想到，堂堂小三月，第一回合就止步于这场游戏的大门之外了。
t_en: Good thing Himeko entrusted this mission to the two of us... Who would've imagined that the great March herself would be stopped at the doorstep in the very first round?

t_ch: 算了，我不像你，本来就没什么英雄气概，平时打游戏也是手跟不上脑瓜…确实是你比较适合这个幻月游戏。
t_en: Forget it, I'm not like you! I was never hero material to begin with... Normally my hands can't even keep up with my brain when I play video games! You're definitely the right person for the Phantasmoon Games.

t_ch: 就是…好可惜呀，难得来姬子姐家乡度个假，想着咱们一起能留下一点愉快的回忆，结果……
t_en: It's just... such a shame. We finally get a chance to vacation in Himeko's hometown, and I thought we'd make some happy memories together, but...

t_ch: 我会带着三月的份一起努力！
t_en: I'll work hard for the both of us!

t_ch: 我会带着三月的份，赢下幻月游戏的！
t_en: I'll triumph in the Phantasmoon Games in your stead!

t_ch: 嗯！
t_en: All right!

t_ch: 我希望三月能平平安安的。
t_en: I hope you'll be safe and sound.
